title: rosa alpina var. oxyodon
intro: Rosa alpina var. oxyodon, also known as the alpine rose or mountain pink rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa alpina var. oxyodon include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
